Text Input

Source: Figma Input Text (2352:2606). Single-line text field with optional left + right icon slots. h-36, radius R(6), P2 Regular. 10 states. Hint Text supports 6 type variants (Default / Info / Success / Warning / Error / Disabled) with colored icons.

States
Default
Hover
Active (focused)
Filled
Hover on Filled
Disabled
Error
Success
Common_Hint variants
Hint Text Hint Text Hint Text Hint Text Hint Text Hint Text
Full field (Text_Input_Base)
Label (Optional)
Hint Text
Label (Optional)
Hint Text
Label (Optional)
Hint Text
Label (Optional)
Hint Text
Label (Optional)
Hint Text
Label (Optional)
Hint Text
